market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

analysis.rewritten_desc:
Welcome to your stylish, entire‑home retreat in the heart of the city. This bright, modern space comfortably sleeps up to 4 guests, offering a premium Premier Inn mattress for a restful night’s sleep. Enjoy unlimited entertainment with a flat‑screen TV equipped with Netflix and SKY Sports, perfect for winding down after a day of sightseeing. 

At a nightly rate of £106.8, you’re paying 31% less than the city’s median price of £154.60, delivering exceptional value without compromising comfort. The home has earned a 4.96 rating from 50 glowing reviews, reflecting the high standard of cleanliness and hospitality guests experience. 

Your stay includes a fully equipped kitchen, spacious living area, and a spotless bathroom—everything you need for a hassle‑free visit. Although the listing does not currently highlight parking or outdoor space, you’ll find convenient public transport links and nearby attractions within walking distance. 

With 45 open nights over the next 90 days, there’s plenty of flexibility to book the dates that suit you best. Book now and experience a top‑rated, budget‑friendly stay that combines comfort, entertainment, and a prime location—all at a price that’s hard to beat.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a bright bedroom photo featuring the Premier Inn mattress as the cover image; it showcases the key comfort promise and will attract guests looking for a great night’s sleep.
key_diagnosis: Title mismatch: the title claims "sleeps 6" while the listing capacity is only 4 guests – correct this to avoid confusion and align with the actual occupancy limit.
Missing high‑value amenities: no parking or outdoor space is listed; adding a dedicated parking spot and highlighting any private patio can tap into guest preferences and boost appeal.

No photos listed: the listing likely has zero images; add at least 12 high‑quality photos (living room, bedroom, kitchen, bathroom, and any outdoor area) with the bedroom as the lead photo to improve visual engagement.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your nightly rate is 31% below the city median (£106.8 vs £154.6) yet your 90‑day occupancy sits at just 50%—there’s clear upside to fill those 45 open nights.
